---
title: "About"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/billybatsaikhan
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:bilguuniqo@gmail.com
---

Hi, my name is **Billy**. I'm an Applied Scientist based in Japan.

This site is where I archive topics related to applied data science, machine
learning, and causal inference — equal parts public notebook and reference for
my future self.

Topics I tend to write about:

- Causal inference (overlap, omitted-variable bias, recommendations as treatments)
- Machine learning in production / MLOps
- The occasional deep dive when I fall down a rabbit hole

### Start here

If you're new, these are the posts I'd point you to first:

- [Assessing Overlap in Covariate Distributions](../posts/causal-inference-assessing-overlap-in-covariate-distributions/) — a walk through Chapter 14 of Imbens & Rubin, with the diagnostics worked out.
- [Estimating the Distribution of Omitted Variable Bias](../posts/gemini-deep-research-summary-of-the-state-of-ovb/) — how much could an unobserved confounder move your estimate?
- [Recommendations as Treatments](../posts/recommendations-as-treatments/) — framing recsys through a causal-inference lens.

If something here is useful, wrong, or worth a conversation, reach out by email.
